topic: place value and expanded form of decimals using fractions
latex:
Select the number below which is equivalent to:
$$(7 \times 100) + (4 \times 10) + (6 \times 1) + \left(9 \times \frac{1}{100}\right) + \left(8 \times \frac{1}{1,000}\right)$$

A. $746.098$

B. $746.0098$

C. $746.908$

D. $746.98$
